user.title: Set up HA Input Bridge
user.description: On your Windows PC, right-click the HA Input Bridge tray icon and choose Copy setup info. Paste the copied text below.

data_description.name: Display name for this bridge.
data_description.setup_info: Paste the setup info copied from the Windows tray icon. It should include Host, Port, and Token.

error.setup_info_too_long: The pasted setup info is too long. Copy setup info again from the Windows tray icon.
error.missing_host: The pasted setup info does not contain a Host value.
error.missing_token: The pasted setup info does not contain a Token value.
error.invalid_port: The pasted setup info contains an invalid Port value.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to HA Input Bridge. Check that the Windows bridge is running.

abort.already_configured: This HA Input Bridge instance is already configured.

arm.name: Arm bridge
arm.description: Temporarily arm the bridge so input commands are accepted.

seconds.name: Seconds
seconds.description: How long the bridge should stay armed.

position.name: Get mouse position
position.description: Return the current mouse position and virtual desktop bounds.

move.name: Move mouse
move.description: Move the mouse to absolute virtual desktop coordinates.

x.name: X coordinate
x.description: Horizontal virtual desktop coordinate. Can be negative on extended displays.

y.name: Y coordinate
y.description: Vertical virtual desktop coordinate. Can be negative on some display layouts.

move_relative.name: Move mouse relative
move_relative.description: Move the mouse relative to its current position.

click.name: Click mouse
click.description: Click at the current mouse position.

mouse_down.name: Mouse button down
mouse_down.description: Press and hold a mouse button.

button.name: Button
button.description: Mouse button to press and hold.

release_all.name: Release all mouse buttons
release_all.description: Release left, right, and middle mouse buttons. Use this if a drag gets stuck.

scroll.name: Scroll mouse wheel
scroll.description: Scroll at the current mouse position.

amount.name: Amount
amount.description: Positive values scroll up; negative values scroll down.

write.name: Write text
write.description: Type text into the active window.

keys.name: Keys
keys.description: List of keys to press together, such as ctrl and l.
